Mental Game, Part 1
Bonus: Operation Quick Start
Inner Game vs. Outer Game
• Outer game is everything that happens outside
yourself - this is where most people focus:
• What camera should I use?
• What microphone should I use?
• Where should I host my video?
• But it’s not as important as the Inner Game…
Inner Game vs. Outer Game
• Inner Game…
• Happens between your ears
• It’s more important to shoot video than to have
the right camera
• But that requires having your head together

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Why Inner Game is everything
• Business is about creation - everything is created
in the mind first
• You will have ups and downs - everyone does -
expect it
• You have to expect big things - and forgive
yourself when you miss
Successful people have a bias toward
action
• You don’t need to be perfect
• Don’t expect to have everything figured out
before you start
“…Way leads on to way.”
- The Road Not Taken by Robert Frost

Successful people have a bias toward
action
• You will make mistakes and have false starts - we
all do
• If you don’t decide - you’ve made a decision - the
decision is to stay where you are
• The plan is never complete
• “Man plans, God laughs”
“The Plan is nothing. Planning is
everything.”
- President Dwight D. Eisenhower
“A good plan violently executed today is
better than a perfect plan executed next
week.”
- General George Patton
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
The plan is never complete
• I started off with a stock newsletter - I never
thought it would change the business world
• You course correct and you get closer and closer
to the goal
• Unless you take action, you can’t course correct
• Successful people have a bias towards action
Protect your confidence
• There will be dream stealers - you need to keep
them out of your life
• Some will do it with good intentions
• Many will be jealous
Protect your confidence
• Reality: Many people are NOT going to take action
to create a better life
• When they see you doing it, it makes them face
that reality
• So they want to see you quit
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
“Those who say it can’t be done should get
out of the way of those who are doing it.”
Protect your confidence
• Share your plans with people who will be your
champions (not to everyone)
• Listen to people with experience - not people
who have no experience
• I had people tell me my plans wouldn’t work
Protect your confidence
• Find your champions, be a champion
• Remember - it’s about baby steps
• Celebrate the wins (big and small)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	6
Decide you’re going to win
• Successful people keep trying until they find something
that works
• Unsuccessful people try something, and if it doesn’t
meet with quick success, then they quit
It’s all mental game…
• Take action
• Protect your confidence
• Decide you’re going to win
